title: GitHub Actions の 409 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: All major factual claims are supported by official documentation or reliable technical sources.
The article provides practical and accurate solutions for GitHub Actions 409 errors.
The specific mention of 'GitHub Enterprise 2.20' is outdated, impacting the overall freshness of the article, though the underlying concepts regarding Enterprise-level policies remain relevant.

sources.title: 409 Conflict - HTTP - MDN Web Docs - Mozilla
sources.claim: HTTP ステータスコード 409 は、リクエストがサーバー上のリソースの現在の状態と競合していることを示します。(HTTP status code 409 indicates that the request conflicts with the current state of the resource on the server.)

sources.title: Concurrency - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: 別のデプロイが進行中である場合 (another deployment is in progress) in GitHub Actions often leads to 409 errors, resolvable by '同時デプロイの制御（concurrency）' (controlling concurrent deployments).

sources.title: Protect prod, cut costs: concurrency in GitHub Actions | Blacksmith
sources.claim: 別のデプロイが進行中である場合 (another deployment is in progress) in GitHub Actions often leads to 409 errors, resolvable by '同時デプロイの制御（concurrency）' (controlling concurrent deployments).

sources.title: How to Use Concurrency Control in GitHub Actions - OneUptime
sources.claim: 別のデプロイが進行中である場合 (another deployment is in progress) in GitHub Actions often leads to 409 errors, resolvable by '同時デプロイの制御（concurrency）' (controlling concurrent deployments).

sources.title: Deploying with GitHub Actions
sources.claim: 別のデプロイが進行中である場合 (another deployment is in progress) in GitHub Actions often leads to 409 errors, resolvable by '同時デプロイの制御（concurrency）' (controlling concurrent deployments).

sources.title: REST API endpoints for repository contents - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: ファイルハッシュ（SHA）の不一致による同時更新競合 (concurrent update conflicts due to file hash (SHA) mismatch) occurs when the SHA in the request doesn't match the server's state, leading to a 409 error. Solution is 'ファイル更新時の SHA リトライロジック' (SHA retry logic for file updates).

sources.title: REST API endpoints for GitHub Actions permissions - GitHub Enterprise Cloud Docs
sources.claim: Organization/Enterprise レベルのポリシーと権限設定の競合 (conflicts with Organization/Enterprise level policies and permission settings) occurs when accessing the `actions/permissions` endpoint via API. Solution is 'ポリシー競合の事前確認' (prior confirmation of policy conflicts).

sources.title: REST API endpoints for pull requests - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: マージ競合のある PR を API 経由でマージしようとした場合 (attempting to merge a PR with merge conflicts via API) returns a 409 error. Solution is 'マージ可能性の検証' (verification of mergeability).

sources.title: Always getting a 409 when I try to merge via Github API - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: マージ競合のある PR を API 経由でマージしようとした場合 (attempting to merge a PR with merge conflicts via API) returns a 409 error. Solution is 'マージ可能性の検証' (verification of mergeability).

sources.title: Enable Diagnostic Logs - Azure App Service - Microsoft Learn
sources.claim: `azure/webapps-deploy` アクションを使用してエラー 409 が発生した場合、Azure ポータルのデプロイブレードで詳細を確認する必要があります。Kudu（App Service の高度な管理ツール）で進行中のデプロイを強制停止できます。(If a 409 error occurs using the `azure/webapps-deploy` action, details should be checked in the Azure portal deployment blade. Ongoing deployments can be forced to stop in Kudu (App Service advanced management tool).)

sources.title: Enforcing policies for GitHub Actions in your enterprise - GitHub Enterprise Server 3.16 Docs
sources.claim: GitHub Enterprise 2.20 以降では、Enterprise Admin が Actions のアクセスポリシーを一元管理しています。(In GitHub Enterprise 2.20 and later, Enterprise Admins centrally manage Actions access policies.)

sources.title: Push multiple files to GitHub repository via Github REST API | n8n workflow template
sources.claim: 複数のファイルを同時に更新する場合、個別の PUT リクエストを連続送信するのではなく、Git Tree API を使用して一括更新する方法が 409 エラーを回避しやすいです。(When updating multiple files simultaneously, using the Git Tree API for batch updates instead of sending individual PUT requests sequentially is less likely to cause 409 errors.)

sources.title: Push multiple files under a single commit through GitHub API - Siddhartha Varma - Medium

sources.title: Details on GitHub Actions permissions - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: GitHub API の詳細確認 (Detailed confirmation of GitHub API) using `curl -v -H "Authorization: token <your-github-token>" https://api.github.com/repos/<organization>/<repository>/actions/permissions`.

unsupported_claims: ワークフロー実行ページの `Logs` タブで完全なエラーメッセージを確認します。デバッグモードを有効化することでより詳細な情報が表示されます。
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.

Optional improvement: Consider directly embedding the source URLs within the article text for immediate reference, especially for official documentation links.
